title: Allahabad University Controller of Examination Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
short_info: Allahabad University Controller of Examination Notification 2026 has been released on 01 June 2026 on the official website. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the Allahabad University Controller of Examination Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 57 years Age relaxation rules will be applicable as per government norms.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's Degree with at least 55% marks or equivalent Grade 'B' in UGC seven point scale, At least 15 years experience as Assistant Professor in Level 11 and above or 8 years in Level 12 and above including Associate Professor with educational administration experience, Comparable experience in research establishment and/or other institution of higher education, 15 years of administrative experience of which 8 years shall be as Deputy Registrar or equivalent post
qualification.details: Master's Degree with at least 55% marks or equivalent Grade 'B' in UGC seven point scale. At least 15 years experience as Assistant Professor in Level 11 and above or 8 years in Level 12 and above including Associate Professor with educational administration experience. Comparable experience in research establishment and/or other institution of higher education. 15 years of administrative experience of which 8 years shall be as Deputy Registrar or equivalent post.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Allahabad University Controller of Examination Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://www.allduniv.ac.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
